label: 280c–5 General provisions

children.heading: Limitation on administrative expenses
children.label: a Limitation on administrative expenses
children.text: The Secretary may not make a grant or cooperative agreement under sections 280c–3 or 280c–4 of this title to an entity unless the entity agrees that not more than 5 percent of the grant or cooperative agreement will be expended for administrative expenses with respect to the grant or cooperative agreement.1So in original. Probably should be “section”.1
contain the description of intended expenditures;
with respect to carrying out the purpose for which the grant is to be made, provide assurances of compliance satisfactory to the Secretary; and
otherwise be in such form, be made in such manner, and contain such information and agreements as the Secretary determines to be necessary to carry out this subpart.

children.heading: Evaluations and report by Secretary
children.label: c Evaluations and report by Secretary

children.text: provide for an evaluation of the activities for which an award is made under sections 280c–3 or 280c–4 of this title; and1
not later than 1 year after the completion of such evaluations, submit to the Congress a report describing the findings made as a result of the evaluations.

children.heading: Definition
children.label: d Definition
children.text: In this subpart, the terms “Indian tribe” and “tribal organization” have the meanings given such terms in .section 1603 of title 25

children.heading: Authorizations of appropriations
children.label: e Authorizations of appropriations
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out this subpart, there are authorized to be appropriated $20,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2020 through 2024 and $33,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2025 through 2029.
